attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 				SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  SCXOOLE.SERVICE_ENTITLEMENT_STATUS ,   
SCXOOLE.LINE_ID                     ,  
SCXOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME                  , 
SCXOOLE.QUOTE_NUMBER                  ,
COALESCE (SCXOOLE.TAA,'=')                         ,
SCXOOLE.SHIP_TO_PO_NUMBER CUST_TRX_REFERENCE_NUM       ,
SCXOOLE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME            ,
SCXOOLE.BUNDLE_LINE_ID                ,	
COALESCE (SCXOOLE.CLEAN_CONFIG_FLAG,'N')             ,
SCXOOLE.SERVICE_OFFSET_DAYS,
COALESCE (SCXOOLE.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,
COALESCE (SCXOOLE.INVOICE_ELIGIBILITY_EVENT,'UNKNOWN')INVOICE_ELIGIBILITY_EVENT_CD,
USER 								EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 				EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
SCXOOLE.ORIGINAL_PROMISE_DATE,
/*Added as part of SCLSS Q3FY14 APRIL RELEASE*/
COALESCE (SCXOOLE.LEGACY_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,'UNKNOWN') LEGACY_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
/*END OF CHANGE */
COALESCE(NRCAL1.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY, -999)  AS  RESELLER_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY /* As part of SALES_ORDER_LINES changes for August release,2014*/,
/*ADDED AS PART OF CSSO CHANGE */
COALESCE(SCXOOLE.PAK_DELIVERY_PREF	,'UNKNOWN') AS PAK_DELIVERY_PREF,
/*FOLLOWING COLUMNS added by OM LSS team*/
SCXOOLE.SMT_LINE_ID,
SCXOOLE.SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER,
/*END OF CHANGE */
/* added as part of Q3FY15 SC-LSS  */
SCXOOLE.ORIGINAL_PROMISED_DELIVER_DATE,
/* added as part of Q3FY15 SC-LSS  */
/*ADDED AS PART OF APR QWN */
SCXOOLE.FUTURE_INVOICE_RELEASE_DATE,
COALESCE(SCXOOLE.REQUESTED_CONTRACT_NUMBER, 'UNKNOWN')  AS REQUESTED_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
/*ADDED AS PART OF APR QWN */
/* Q1FY16 column addition starts*/
SCXOOLE.DERIVED_CUST_REQ_SHIP_DATE,
/* Q1FY16 column addition */ 
COALESCE(SCXOOLE.MFG_PO_ORG_ID,-999),
COALESCE(SCXOOLE.CORP_DEV_DEAL_NAME,'UNKNOWN'), /*Added as part of CORP DEV DEAL FLAG changes Q4FY18 July Release*/
COALESCE(SCXOOLE.CORP_DEV_DEAL_TYPE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') /*Added as part of CORP DEV DEAL FLAG changes Q4FY18 July Release*/
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.ELA_BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME,'UNKNOWN') /*Added as part of ELA_BUYING_PROGRAM changes Q3FY19 Mar 10th Release*/
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.IN_COUNTRY_ROUTING_CD,'UNKNOWN') 
,SCXOOLE.STOCK_REPLENISHMENT /*Added the column STOCK_REPLENISHMENT as part of 6th Oct 2019 Release*/
,COALESCE(SSOL_PBS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-999)
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.GROUP_LINE_ID,-999)
,COALESCE(SCXOOLE.ORIG_MFG_PO_ORG_ID,-999)
,COALESCE(TRIM(CASE 
        WHEN POSITION('-' IN TRIM(SCXOOLE.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE)) = 0  THEN TRIM(SCXOOLE.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE)
            ELSE REVERSE( SUBSTRING( REVERSE(TRIM(SCXOOLE.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE))
			  FROM 1 FOR POSITION('-' IN REVERSE(TRIM(SCXOOLE.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE))) - 1 )  ) 
			  END ) ,'UNKNOWN') AS LOCATION_CD
,COALESCE(( CASE 
    WHEN HRL.STYLE = 'CN_GLB' THEN PL.MEANING 
    ELSE HRL.TOWN_OR_CITY 
END ),' ')  || ', ' || 
COALESCE(HRL.REGION_2, HRL.REGION_1, HRL.REGION_3, ' ') || ', ' || 
FT.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  AS DISTRIBUTOR_SHIP_CENTER_LOC_CD

FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT SCXOOLE
INNER JOIN 
(
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON
( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
)
ON 
(SCXOOLE.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NRCAL1
ON SCXOOLE.RESELLER_BID=NRCAL1.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT 

LEFT  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL HRL
ON 
HRL.LOCATION_CODE = LOCATION_CD

LEFT  JOIN 
(SELECT 
        LOOKUP_CODE,MEANING
    FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES
    WHERE LOOKUP_TYPE = 'CN_PROVINCE'
      AND ENABLED_FLAG = 'Y'
	  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY LOOKUP_CODE, MEANING ORDER BY GES_UPDATE_DATE DESC ) = 1)  PL
       ON PL.LOOKUP_CODE = HRL.TOWN_OR_CITY

JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY FT 
     ON HRL.COUNTRY = FT.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
	 
/* As part of SALES_ORDER_LINES changes for August release,2014*/
LEFT JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL_PBS /*SSRESHTA*/
ON ( SCXOOLE.PBS_PARENT_LINE_ID=SSOL_PBS.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND SSOL_PBS.SS_CODE ='CG' )/*SSRESHTA*/
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SCXOOLE.LINE_ID ORDER BY SCXOOLE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC)=1
